description_long: This is a medium-sized, bulbous vase with a wide, flared mouth and a rounded body that tapers slightly towards the base. The surface is adorned with subtle, raised ornamental textures that give it a tactile, sculpted appearance, reminiscent of classical or neoclassical ceramic art. The vase is uniformly white, suggesting it is either unglazed porcelain or a matte-finished ceramic. There are no visible handles or additional appendages, and the opening at the top is sufficiently wide for floral arrangements or decorative branches. The base is flat, ensuring stability when placed on a horizontal surface. Its overall design is elegant yet understated, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban decorative settings.
description: A white, bulbous vase with a flared mouth and sculpted, textured surface, exuding a classical decorative style. Its matte finish and rounded form make it ideal for urban display.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flared mouth and rounded body with visible surface texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vase's symmetrical, bulbous shape and consistent texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the same rounded profile and surface details.
description_view_3: Rear view reveals the back curvature and a subtle central raised motif on the body.
